subheadline: Real results from operations, support, and product leads who run their week on the platform.

testimonials.quote: We replaced three tools and a weekly status meeting. Our launch reviews now take 20 minutes instead of two hours.
Support ticket backlog dropped 64% in the first quarter. The shared inbox and automations did most of the work for us, and onboarding a new agent now takes a single afternoon.
Setup took an afternoon, not the two-week migration we budgeted for.
Our managers finally trust the numbers. Live dashboards killed the Friday spreadsheet ritual, and forecasting is now a five-minute conversation instead of a half-day export.
Adoption hit 90% in two weeks with zero formal training. The interface just makes sense.
We onboarded 40 new clients last month without adding headcount. The templates and permission controls let us scale the same playbook to every account without anything slipping.
